## AI Switchboard for Mac 0.0.1

- Adds a Headroom-owned optimization stack with native runtime evidence, rollback states, and guided LeanCtx shadow mode.
- Adds an exact local replay cache with account isolation, safety bypasses, request-variant hashing, and transactional enablement.
- Adds deterministic Repo Intelligence context packs with Chonkify license gating.
- Adds explicit readiness and quality gates for LLMLingua-2 and PXPipe instead of presenting unverified upstream integrations as live.
- Adds optimization-engine profiles, lifecycle receipts, honest availability states, and recovery controls across the add-ons UI.
- Hardens release-readiness reporting with connector inventory evidence and schema validation.

This release remains local-first. Provider traffic continues to use the configured provider APIs; local optimization state and cache data stay on the Mac.
